name: confirmIdea(AFFIRM) architect failure — non-fatal: ok:true, pipeline_started, architect_error present, graph stays ARCHITECT_DESIGN (PHASE-20 Step 3)
description: RED (before Step 3): architect not invoked, architect_error never set, pipeline_started absent. GREEN: mock architect invoked with no scripted response → fails → confirmIdea still ok:true, pipeline_started:true, architect_error set, graph.current_state === 'ARCHITECT_DESIGN' (did not advance).
